stories.headline: Olivia Wilde Reveals What Tom Cruise Said After She Was Served Custody Papers Onstage - E! Online
stories.summary: Olivia Wilde detailed being served custody papers onstage during a Don't Worry Darling presentation at CinemaCon in 2022, two years after she and Jason Sudeikis broke up, and Tom Cruise’s response.

stories.headline: Jimmy Kimmel Sidekick Guillermo Rodriguez Joins ‘Dancing With the Stars’ Season 35 - TMZ
stories.summary: Guillermo Rodriguez is adding another gig to his resume … ‘cause TMZ has heard the beloved “Jimmy Kimmel Live!” personality is joining the upcoming season of “Dancing with the Stars.”

stories.headline: ‘Survivor’ Animated Movie in the Works From Paramount Animation, Jeff Probst to Exec Produce (EXCLUSIVE) - Variety
stories.summary: Paramount Animation, in partnership with CBS, is making an animated comedy based on CBS' "Survivor," with host Jeff Probst executive producing.

stories.headline: Tyrese Haliburton’s bride-to-be shares heartbreaking tribute after her ‘once-in-a-lifetime friend’ dies on bachelorette trip - New York Post
stories.summary: Indiana Pacers star Tyrese Haliburton’s fiancée shared a touching tribute on Wednesday honoring her best friend who unexpectedly died during her lavish St. Barts bachelorette trip.

stories.headline: '90 Day Fiancé' Star Thais Ramone Bodycam Footage Shows Domestic Battery Arrest - TMZ
stories.summary: "90 Day Fiancé" star Thais Ramone's domestic battery arrest is now coming into sharper focus ... because TMZ has obtained police bodycam footage from the incident involving her estranged husband, Pat…

stories.headline: Irina Shayk sizzles in topless photos for new fashion campaign - Fox News
stories.summary: Irina Shayk poses topless in new Haikure collaboration, sharing photos she shot herself at home to celebrate the Italian fashion brand partnership.

stories.headline: Anya Taylor-Joy says it's 'difficult' to talk honestly about working with George Miller on Furiosa - Entertainment Weekly
stories.summary: Anya Taylor-Joy said that it's "difficult" to speak about working with George Miller on 'Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga.'

stories.headline: Netflix Cancels the Duffer Brothers Series ‘The Boroughs’ After One Season - The Hollywood Reporter
stories.summary: 'Stranger Things' creators Matt and Ross Duffer are headed to Paramount.
